---
title: Projects
description: "Research projects, software, and tools in climate science and R programming."
listing:
  contents:
    - "project-items/metadata.yml"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  image-height: "200px"
  grid-columns: 3
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: css/projects.css
title-block-banner: false
---
